title: The History of R-Series Astromech Droids

"'''The History of R-Series Astromech Droids'''" is an article from [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]], written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and illustrated by [[Matt Busch]]. It detailed the history of [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton's]] line of [[R-series/Legends|R-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]].

===Collected in===
*<!-- 1995-08-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]]
